channel.title: San Diego Specialty Coffee — News & Events
channel.description: San Diego coffee news, events, and openings — curated by the r/SanDiegoCoffeeBeans community.

item.title: San Diego World of Coffee 2026
item.description: The Specialty Coffee Expo has rebranded as World of Coffee and is making its North American debut right here in San Diego this April. Three days of competitions, workshops, cupping rooms, and hundreds of exhibitors from across the global coffee industry.

item.title: Playground Art Coffee Debuts in North Park This Month
item.description: A new cafe concept blending specialty coffee and art is coming to North Park. Playground Art Coffee opens March 26th with a three day grand opening celebration. They will be serving Torque Coffee, a City Heights roaster with a well earned reputation for quality among the SD specialty coffee crowd.

item.title: Necessity Coffee Opens Second Location in San Marcos
item.description: Necessity Coffee opened their second location on March 7th in San Marcos, joining their original spot as part of North City, a mixed-use masterplanned neighborhood. The roaster has built a loyal following around high quality sourcing and lighter roast profiles that let the beans do the talking.
